시편 15:1.content: Yahweh, who shall dwell in your sanctuary? Who shall live on your holy hill?

시편 15:2.content: He who walks blamelessly and does what is right, and speaks truth in his heart;

시편 15:3.content: he who doesn’t slander with his tongue, nor does evil to his friend, nor casts slurs against his fellow man;

시편 15:4.content: in whose eyes a vile man is despised, but who honors those who fear Yahweh; he who keeps an oath even when it hurts, and doesn’t change;

시편 15:5.content: he who doesn’t lend out his money for usury, nor take a bribe against the innocent. He who does these things shall never be shaken.
